title.en: The Four Species (Arba Minim): How to Choose and Use Them
title.zh: 四種植物(Arba Minim):如何選擇和使用
title.he: ארבעת המינים: כיצד לבחור ולהשתמש בהם

description: A guide to selecting the lulav, etrog, hadas, and arava — and the waving ritual performed during Sukkot.
historical_period_mapping: Shang Dynasty (商朝) ~1300-1046 BCE, Spring & Autumn to Han Dynasty (春秋時期至漢朝) ~957 BCE - 70 CE
